steps.title: Substitute the equations
steps.content: Replace $y$ in the second equation using $y=x+48$: $$(x+48)^2=x+48.$$

steps.title: Solve the equation
steps.content: Let $u=x+48$, so $u^2=u$ gives $u(u-1)=0$, meaning $x+48=0$ or $x+48=1$. Thus $x=-48$ or $x=-47$.

steps.title: Pick a valid x
steps.content: Among the choices, $x=-47$ appears. That matches choice A — A is correct.
